title: Mazars morning note: Inflation is improving. We're still not fighting the Fed
section_path: Mazars morning note: Inflation is improving. We're still not fighting the Fed
section_path_text: Mazars morning note: Inflation is improving. We're still not fighting the Fed
summary:
Summary
Despite the Fed's persistently hawkish rhetoric, since the last quarter of 2022, markets have embraced a more positive narrative, mostly on the back of increasingly benign US inflation numbers. Nevertheless, markets focusing on dissecting inflation numbers are ignoring one basic rule. The question is not ‘where is inflation heading', but rather, where the Fed thinks inflation is heading.
